query: garish toxic color combination unsettling photograph
message: anti-aesthetic / color_and_tone / clashing_disharmony — garish toxic color combinations, unsettling palettes

response.objective_caption: A person wearing a multicolored knitted hat with ear flaps and braided tassels bites into a yellow ear of corn. The individual has dark, thick eyebrows and is looking directly at the camera. The corn shows visible kernels with a partially eaten section in the middle. The background is dark and out of focus.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A person wearing a multicolored knitted hat with ear flaps bites into a yellow ear of corn while staring directly at the camera with an aggressive, angry expression. The subject's skin has a sickly greenish-yellow cast, and harsh direct flash illumination creates bright specular highlights on the corn and forehead while plunging the background into darkness. The confrontational close-up perspective emphasizes the subject's furrowed brows and wide eyes.
